purpose: Text-only SHOT-02 combat stage closeout and future edit execution checklist after V018 1.18x was locked as the current SHOT-02 edit candidate.

backup_candidate.use_condition: Test only if full sequence pacing makes 1.18x feel too fast.

supporting_references.use_policy: Use as a realism, hard-combat energy, and 1980s-feeling reference only. Do not treat as current locked edit candidate.
Optional lower-body or line-stealing insert/reference in a later edit-conform phase. Do not auto-insert.
Useful for camera/framing lessons, but action is slow/soft and should not be used as the combat target.
Use only as a negative reference for what to avoid.

avoid_patterns: particle effects that reduce impact readability
overusing lower-body action so the fight loses upper-body impact
final pose-out or static poster hold
weak contact without rebound or body displacement
edit_execution_checklist: Use V018 1.18x as current main combat candidate.
Test V018 1.12x only if sequence-level pacing makes 1.18x feel too fast.
Preserve V013 as historical locked passed segment.
Do not auto-insert V014-R02 or V016 without a later edit-conform phase.
Do not generate V019 unless human explicitly asks for alternates.
Do not create final master without human approval.
Do not treat current edit candidate lock as whole-film final approval.
Do not stage media or upload-safe JPG files.
source_learning_candidates: Local speed diagnostics can rescue slightly slow but otherwise strong AI-video generations.
Record primary speed candidate and conservative backup separately.
lock_scope must distinguish current edit candidate from whole-film final master.
Preserve older locked passed segments when a newer candidate is locked at a different scope.
After a strong candidate is found, stop generating and move to edit-map planning.
Repeated gentle checks and long binds tend to produce soft combat.
Hard-impact prompts benefit from collision, rebound, foot skid, and torso off-line feedback language.
Particle effects should stay secondary unless the shot is explicitly VFX-focused.
future_next_options: Move to SHOT-02 sequence-level edit/conform planning.
Prepare a Source update later only after more shot cycles accumulate.
